sections.heading: UI to Engine API Mapping
sections.content: The graphical interface routes user actions safely across thread boundaries to the background VisionEngine and TacticalSerial threads without causing UI freezes.

sections.heading: Dashboard & Real-Time Controls
rows: Initializes cameras, hardware, and begins the main QThread inference loop
Safely signals the loop to exit, closes cameras, and sends servos home
Delegates to TacticalSerial to toggle ESP32 GPIO 14. Intent is preserved across disconnects
Bypasses the 5s serial auto-reconnect cooldown and forces an immediate attempt
Applies a real-time global degree offset (±18.0°) to the final homography output
Adjusts the Exponential Moving Average (EMA) alpha filter applied to servo commands to prevent jitter

sections.heading: Hardware Manual Controls (tab_hardware.py)
rows: Moves servos from 0° to 180° manually for testing wiring and range
Immediately sends servos to the safe home position
Automatically sweeps pan from 0° to 180° and back to verify full range capability

sections.heading: Calibration Controls
rows: Saves valid chessboard corner detections to memory for stereo processing
Executes cv2.stereoCalibrate() in the background PythonCalibWorker thread
Computes the RANSAC 3x3 homography matrix from collected pixel-to-angle points
